# KiCad 10 Test Fixtures — Attribution

Some fixtures in this directory are inspired by or derived from real open-source KiCad 10
projects. Where external projects influenced the test design, they are listed below.

## CH224A-breakout (UW Reality Labs)

- **Repository**: <https://github.com/uwrealitylabs/CH224A-breakout>
- **Author**: [UW Reality Labs](https://github.com/uwrealitylabs)
- **Description**: KiCad 10 breakout board for the CH224A USB-C PD sink controller.
- **Use in this project**: Used as a real-world development benchmark to validate the
  KiCad Studio extension's schematic viewer, DRC analysis, AI chat, and MCP integration
  against an actual KiCad 10 board. No files from the repository are bundled here;
  the attribution is provided for transparency.

All fixture files in this directory are either synthetic or created independently for
testing purposes.
